jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Sahyadri Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sahyadri Hospitals. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
